_note: Maps every numeric claim in memo.pdf and the blog post to its source. Populated incrementally — each claim added as it appears in a deliverable.

_schema.claim_id: Unique ID for the claim, format: C-NNN
_schema.claim_text: The exact numeric claim as it appears in the deliverable
_schema.source_type: trace | task | ablation_row | probe | public_source | cost_log
_schema.source_id: trace simulation_id, task_id TB-NNNN, ablation row key, probe ID P-NNN, or URL
_schema.verified: true when source has been checked against the artifact

claims.source_id: P-006, P-007, P-008, P-009, P-010 — seeds/failure_taxonomy.md

claims.claim_text: Signal Over-Claiming annual pipeline cost ~$2.40M per 1,000 touches
